title: Open Help Section and Verify Navigation
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the Help section. | Verify that the header shows the title 'Help' and the search icon is present.
expected_result: The Help section is displayed. | The header shows the title 'Help' and the search icon is present.

title: Search for an Article
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter the search term 'locations' in the search bar. | Press enter to perform the search.

title: Select an Article from the Knowledge Base
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Navigate to the 'Knowledge Base' section. | Select an article from the 'Locations' category.

title: Verify Article Navigation
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Navigate to the 'Knowledge Base' section. | Select an article from the 'Locations' category. | Navigate back to the 'Knowledge Base' section.

title: Verify Article Count
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Navigate to the 'Knowledge Base' section.
expected_result: There are 4 articles under the 'Locations' category. | There are 5 articles under the 'Mapping' category. | There is 1 article under the 'Push Alerts' category.

title: Verify Footer Information
expected_result: The footer shows the text 'Powered by UserVoice' and 'Android SDK v1.2.5.'

title: Verify Search Functionality
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Enter the search term 'locations' in the search bar. | Press enter to perform the search.

title: Verify Article Selection
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Navigate to the 'Knowledge Base' section. | Select an article from the 'Locations' category.

title: Verify Article Navigation
test_steps: Open the Help section. | Navigate to the 'Knowledge Base' section. | Select an article from the 'Locations' category. | Navigate back to the 'Knowledge Base' section.
